subcodes.first_line: O ye two noble offspring, heralds of the Cause of God! Your loving father, at the threshold of the Lord, was ever mindful of you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نجل جلیل مبلغ امر الله جناب ابوی مهربان در آستان یزدان همواره بیاد شما همدم بود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
